name: Hamburger Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, prepare the hamburger and onion.
2. Add the 3 cans of cream of mushroom soup.
3. Package the mixture in 2 quart size zip lock bags and freeze.
4. When ready to prepare, defrost the stroganoff mixture.
5. Place the mixture in a skillet and heat to simmering.
6. Stir in the sour cream.
7. Serve over noodles or rice.
